attack_chain.description: Discover valid accounts using a password spray attack to gather credentials.
attack_chain.mitigation: Multi-factor Authentication: Enforce MFA for all remote access and privileged accounts. Monitor for anomalous login patterns, impossible travel, and credential stuffing.
